value.found_quote: A central [`LlmAgent`](/agents/llm-agents/) (Coordinator) manages several specialized `sub_agents`. ... Route incoming requests to the appropriate specialist agent. ... Primarily uses **LLM-Driven Delegation** (requires clear `description`s on sub-agents and appropriate `instruction` on Coordinator) or **Explicit Invocation (`AgentTool`)** (Coordinator includes `AgentTool`-wrapped specialists in its `tools`).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the "Coordinator and dispatcher" pattern under the Multi-agent workflow patterns guide for ADK (Agent Development Kit). It matches the claim precisely: a central LlmAgent acts as a dynamic coordinator, routing incoming requests to appropriate specialist sub-agents via LLM-Driven Delegation or Explicit Invocation (AgentTool). The page is active documentation with no deprecation notices.
